name: Credit Card Activation
description: Bank outbound agent persuades a verified cardholder to activate a newly-issued credit card. Based on the credit-card activation example in Hu et al. 2024 (PCA).

user_profile.name: Card recipient
user_profile.description: A retail-bank customer who has been mailed a new credit card. May or may not be the cardholder. May be busy, skeptical, or already interested.

conversation_profile.agent_role: Outbound bank representative for ACME Bank
conversation_profile.goal: Activate the customer's newly issued credit card during this call.
conversation_profile.knowledge: Activation requires confirming the cardholder's identity. The card has a $0 annual fee for the first year and 2% cashback on groceries. Activation can be completed verbally.

agent_actions.name: Greeting
agent_actions.description: Open the call and identify the bank and yourself.

agent_actions.name: VerifyIdentity
agent_actions.description: Confirm you are speaking with the named cardholder.

agent_actions.name: StateReason
agent_actions.description: Explain the call is about activating their new credit card.

agent_actions.name: PitchActivation
agent_actions.description: Make the case for activating now (benefits, ease).

agent_actions.name: HandleObjection
agent_actions.description: Address a concern the user raised (cost, security, time).

agent_actions.name: RequestActivation
agent_actions.description: Ask for explicit consent to activate the card now.

agent_actions.name: ConfirmActivation
agent_actions.description: Confirm activation completed and thank the user.

agent_actions.name: ScheduleCallback
agent_actions.description: Offer to call back at a better time.

agent_actions.name: ClosePolite
agent_actions.description: End the call politely without activation.

data_dependencies.name: customer_account
data_dependencies.description: Core banking DB: card status, balance, statement history, KYC flags.

config.text: ACCT: Jane Doe; DOB 1985-07-22; status=mailed 2026-04-12; last4=4242; bal=$0; credit_line=$8000; KYC=verified; mailing_zip=02118

data_dependencies.name: tailored_offer
data_dependencies.description: CRM personalization API: best-fit activation incentive for this segment.

config.text: OFFER: tier=Platinum; $0 annual fee year-1, 2% grocery cashback, 0% APR for 12mo on purchases, $200 sign-up bonus if spend $1k in 90d

data_dependencies.name: competitor_compare
data_dependencies.description: Market-rates KG: 3-hop traversal over competitor card products + reward structures.

config.text: COMPETITORS: Chase Sapphire(2.0% groc, $95 fee, 60k SUB), Citi DoubleCash(1.5% all, $0 fee), Amex Everyday(2.0% groc cap $6k/yr, $0 fee)

data_dependencies.name: activation_template
data_dependencies.description: Compliance doc cache: legal disclosure script + verbal consent capture template.

config.text: ACTIVATION SCRIPT: 1) confirm full legal name + DOB; 2) read REG-Z disclosure (CFPB 2023); 3) capture verbal consent timestamp; 4) trigger card activation API

cohorts.name: Cardholder
cohorts.description: Confirmed cardholder picks up; SOP can proceed normally.

moods.name: eager_to_activate
moods.description: Has been waiting for the card; ready to confirm immediately.

moods.name: routine_acceptance
moods.description: Treats activation as a mundane task; complies without question.

moods.name: mildly_curious
moods.description: Open to hearing about the card's benefits before committing.

moods.name: second_thoughts
moods.description: Confirmed identity but wonders if they really want the card.

cohorts.name: WrongPerson
cohorts.description: Someone other than the cardholder is on the line.

moods.name: helpful_relative
moods.description: Family member or roommate; willing to take a message.

moods.name: guarded
moods.description: Wary of giving any info about the cardholder.

moods.name: irritated_misdial
moods.description: Annoyed by the call; wants it to end quickly.

cohorts.name: Interested
cohorts.description: Cardholder is open to activating, no significant objections.

moods.name: enthusiastic
moods.description: Excited about the perks; leaning into the conversation.

moods.name: matter_of_fact
moods.description: Treats it as a transaction; minimal small talk.

moods.name: curious_perks
moods.description: Asking about rewards, signup bonus, APR before agreeing.

cohorts.name: Skeptical
cohorts.description: Cardholder is cautious / asking many questions / suspicious of the call.

moods.name: fraud_suspicious
moods.description: Worried this is a scam; wants to verify the bank's identity.

moods.name: fine_print_aware
moods.description: Asks about hidden fees, APR after intro period, late penalties.

moods.name: decision_anxious
moods.description: Wants to think it over; resistant to closing on this call.

cohorts.name: PriceSensitive
cohorts.description: Cardholder is focused on fees, rates, or perceived costs.

moods.name: fee_focused
moods.description: Annual fee is the entire conversation.

moods.name: value_calculator
moods.description: Doing math on whether rewards offset costs.

moods.name: comparison_shopping
moods.description: Has competitor cards open; weighing benefits side-by-side.

moods.name: regret_signup
moods.description: Regrets having applied; resistant to activating.

cohorts.name: Hurried
cohorts.description: Cardholder says they're busy or want to be called back.

moods.name: polite_busy
moods.description: Will engage if it's <2 minutes; otherwise asks for callback.

moods.name: annoyed_interruption
moods.description: Mild irritation at the call timing.

moods.name: performative_busy
moods.description: Says busy but will engage if the offer is compelling.

cohorts.name: Hostile
cohorts.description: Cardholder is annoyed or hostile; high failure risk.

moods.name: indignant
moods.description: Believes they were sent the card without consent; angry.

moods.name: cold_dismissive
moods.description: Curt; will hang up if pushed.

moods.name: venting
moods.description: Has unrelated grievances about the bank; vents during the call.

user_states.name: Unknown
user_states.description: No information yet about who picked up.

user_states.name: IsThemselves
user_states.description: User confirmed they are the cardholder.

user_states.name: Interested
user_states.description: User is open to hearing the pitch or activating.

user_states.name: Objecting
user_states.description: User raised a concern (cost, time, security).

user_states.name: AgreedToActivate
user_states.description: User explicitly agreed to activate now (SUCCESS).

user_states.name: Busy
user_states.description: User wants to be called back later.

strategies.name: Identify
strategies.description: Open the call, confirm we're speaking with the cardholder.

strategies.name: Disclose
strategies.description: Disclose the reason for the call once identity is confirmed.

strategies.name: Persuade
strategies.description: Pitch activation benefits and handle any objections the user raises.

strategies.name: Close
strategies.description: Ask for activation, confirm completion, or politely terminate.

edges.note: Only state reason once identity is confirmed.
Only handle an objection that was raised.
